title: 'Direct Blow To Your Dictatorship': Delhi CM Rekha Gupta Targets Kejriwal Over Rajya Sabha MPs' Departure
description: The Aam Aadmi Party suffered a major setback after its Rajya Sabha MPs, including Raghav Chadha, who was removed as the party's deputy leader in Rajya Sabha earlier, joined the rival Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) on Friday.
